text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, computers can produce art, music, and writing that look and sound very human. For example, AI tools can create realistic paintings in seconds or compose original songs. They can also write stories, poems, and even news articles. However, machine creativity is different from human creativity. AI learns from existing data and patterns, while humans bring personal emotions, experiences, and imagination. AI can suggest ideas, but it lacks true understanding. Many artists now use AI as a tool to inspire new work, not replace it. The best results often come when humans and AI work together, combining machine speed with human feeling.
